examples: As the forerunner, "United 93" will take most of the heat, whether it deserves it or not.
This table was the forerunner of the modern table.
The Garmin Forerunner 410 looks like a regular watch.
That was the forerunner to Communicorp, today one of the largest radio networks in Europe.
Bonaparte issued an order creating an investigative agency that was a forerunner of the FBI.
